Home.title: Alfar Community Center
Home.subtitle: Practical, dignified education with purpose for children in Nepal—centered on the community.
Home.heroCardText: Classes, support and activities that strengthen skills, confidence and opportunities.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Alfar exists to open real opportunities through education, support and community projects—with cultural relevance, inclusion and measurable outcomes.
mission.captionText: Learning grounded in local reality, with modern tools and community values.

p1.title: Access
p1.desc: We reduce barriers so more students can learn and grow.

p2.title: Quality
p2.desc: Clear materials, active methods and continuous improvement.

p3.title: Support
p3.desc: Close follow-up, wellbeing and family involvement.

p4.title: Impact
p4.desc: We track progress and strengthen community capacity.

programs.title: Programs
programs.subtitle: Practical programs for learning, skills and wellbeing.
programs.cardCta: Explore goals, schedules and how to join.

p1.title: Academic support
p1.desc: Reading, math and science with personalized guidance.

p2.title: Languages & communication
p2.desc: Functional English, expression and tools for the future.

p3.title: Technology & skills
p3.desc: Basic computing, logical thinking and guided projects.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments of learning, community and growth.

cta.title: Join Alfar
cta.subtitle: Support as a volunteer, partner or donor. Every contribution builds real opportunities.
cta.cardText: Email us and we’ll share how to help, current needs and next steps.
